  _185 = torch.clamp_min(noise_sigma, 1.1920928955078125e-07)
  x = torch.mul(torch.log(_185), CONSTANTS.c0)
  element = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(x, 0))
  element0 = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(x, 1))
  result = torch.mul(element, CONSTANTS.c1)
  x0 = torch.reshape(x, [int(torch.mul_(result, element0))])
  element1 = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(x0, 0))
  _186 = int(torch.mul(element1, CONSTANTS.c1))
  x1 = torch.reshape(x0, [_186, 1])
  _187 = torch.add(torch.mul(x1, weights), bias31)
  freqs = torch.mul(_187, CONSTANTS.c2)
  x2 = torch.cos(freqs)
  element2 = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(x2, 0))
  element3 = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(x2, 1))

  element6 = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(_184, 2))

  _198 = int(element8)

def forward_1536(self,

  _21 = getattr(transitions1, "2")
  linear_a_nobias_double = _21.linear_a_nobias_double

=== diffusion_module.forward_2048 ===
def forward_2048(self,
    token_single_initial_repr: Tensor,
    token_pair_initial_repr: Tensor,
    token_single_trunk_repr: Tensor,
    token_pair_trunk_repr: Tensor,
    atom_single_input_feats: Tensor,
    atom_block_pair_input_feats: Tensor,

  input566 = torch.add(_1045, feat_local_added34)
  _1046 = (to_pos_updates).forward6(input566, )
  _1047 = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(_1046, 0))
  element3430 = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(_1046, 1))
  _1048 = int(element3430)
  element3431 = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(_1046, 2))
  _1049 = int(element3431)
  other76 = torch.mul(element3350, CONSTANTS.c1)
  element3432 = torch.floor_divide(_1047, other76)
  _1050 = [int(element3432), _867, _1048, _1049]
  unit_noised_coords_error = torch.reshape(_1046, _1050)
  _1051 = torch.mul(sigma, CONSTANTS.c6)
  _1052 = torch.add(torch.pow(sigma, 2), CONSTANTS.c3)
  _1053 = torch.mul(_1051, torch.pow(_1052, -0.5))
  scaled_coords_error = torch.mul(unit_noised_coords_error, _1053)
  _1054 = torch.add(torch.pow(sigma, 2), CONSTANTS.c3)
  _1055 = torch.mul(torch.reciprocal(_1054), CONSTANTS.c3)
  scaled_noised_coords = torch.mul(atom_noised_coords, _1055)
  x1070 = torch.add(scaled_noised_coords, scaled_coords_error)
  element3433 = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(x1070, 0))
  element3434 = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(x1070, 1))
  element3435 = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(x1070, 2))
  element3436 = ops.prim.NumToTensor(torch.size(x1070, 3))
  result398 = torch.mul(element3433, CONSTANTS.c1)
  _1056 = int(torch.mul_(result398, element3434))
  _1057 = int(torch.mul(element3435, CONSTANTS.c1))
  _1058 = int(torch.mul(element3436, CONSTANTS.c1))
  _1059 = torch.reshape(x1070, [_1056, _1057, _1058])
  return _1059
